steps.title: Match subject and tense
steps.content: The subject is singular: "The word 'robot.'" The sentence also describes a specific completed event in the 1920 play R.U.R., so the verb must be singular and past tense.

steps.title: Use singular past tense
steps.content: A and B are plural forms, and D is present perfect and does not fit a specific completed historical event. "Was" is singular and past tense, matching the subject and the 1920 event. The answer is C.
